action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 successfully fine-tuned the pretrained MetricGAN+ for 1 epoch (val PESQ 2.8595 on 100 files, ~5s epoch time). The MR-STFT+L1 loss pipeline is functional. Pretrained baseline test PESQ is 3.134. Analysis: With ~5.9h and 20 iterations left, and extremely fast training (~1s/epoch), I can afford long fine-tuning runs. The goal is to push PESQ above 3.134. Conservative fine-tuning (lr=1e-5, cosine schedule) over many epochs with full validation is the best bet. I need robust metrics logging and full validation each epoch to catch the best checkpoint. Decision: Write an improved train.py with 20 epochs, batch_size=16, lr=1e-5, cosine annealing, full validation every epoch, and proper metrics.jsonl logging. Run it now.
